lifepro_manual_section: LifePRO Accounting Transactions p.5 (04xx Borrowed Money)
current_conversion_route: Grouped into SURRENDER_CLAIM / DEATH_CLAIM chains when paired
rationale_from_documentation: LifePRO classifies 0411 under Borrowed Money, not death/surrender claims. QLAdmin Help p.827-828: policy loan principal belongs in QuikLoan.
recommended_governance_action: SEMANTIC_GOVERNANCE_HOLD when chain lacks claim payout/benefit codes

lifepro_manual_section: LifePRO Accounting Transactions p.5, p.10 (Loan Interest Capitalized indicator 0412)
rationale_from_documentation: Authoritative LifePRO definition: capitalization is loan accounting. QLAdmin Anniversary Processing capitalizes loan interest to QuikLoan — not QUIKCLMS Death Claims.
Loan repayment is policy-loan maintenance, not a claim event.
Non-collateralized loan taken — borrowed money domain.
Loan interest accrual/capitalization on non-collateralized loans.
Loan payment activity — not claim disbursement.
Loan write-off is borrowed-money accounting, not claim payout.
LifePRO defines 0451 as Unearned Interest Income under Borrowed Money — internal accounting offset, not claim interest (MINTAMT).
